title: Image Western Blots for quantitative immunoblotting using the Bio-Rad VersaDoc CCD camera
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"e8ed6","text":"The Campbell Lab protocol for imaging Western Blots using ECL Select chemi-luminescent detection and the Bio-Rad VersaDoc imager for immunoquantitation of phytoplankton samples.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"1rtcp","text":"The ECL Select is not the most sensitive detection reagent we've tested (that would be ECL Ultra from Lumigen) but it has a linear reaction profile over time when doing quantitative immunoblotting.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Natalie Donaher
